The light is on which it has been working since 1st Century BCE; but when we were first looking at our history (in this case), what really matters now more than any other piece of data that's ever seen? And how far have you come from knowing exactly where or why your ancestors lived during 549 CE/CAD? What about their geographical location ? How did they move around here after these times?
